mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_DELIVERY_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO DELIVERY ( DELIVERY_NO, PAYMENT_NO, BUYER_ID, SELLER_ID, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, POST_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, DELIVERY_REQUEST, COURIER, TRACKING_NO ) VALUES ( #{deliveryNo}, #{paymentNo}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{postCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{deliveryRequest}, #{courier}, #{trackingNo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ITEM SET PAY_STATUS = 'P' WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo}
mapper.select: SELECT DELIVERY_NO, PAYMENT_NO, BUYER_ID, SELLER_ID, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, POST_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, DELIVERY_REQUEST, COURIER, TRACKING_NO FROM DELIVERY WHERE PAYMENT_NO = #{paymentNo}

SELECT i.item_no, i.item_title, i.current_price, i.end_time, p.pay_no as paymentNo, p.pay_status as payStatus, p.approved_at, m.user_id as buyerId, CASE WHEN p.pay_status = 'Y' THEN '결제 완료' WHEN p.pay_status = 'S' THEN '배송 중' WHEN p.pay_status = 'P' THEN '거래 완료' ELSE '취소됨' END as statusText, (SELECT MIN(img_url) FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE item_no = i.item_no) as imgUrl FROM ITEM i JOIN PAYMENT p ON i.item_no = p.item_no JOIN MEMBER m ON p.user_no = m.user_no WHERE i.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY
CASE p.pay_status WHEN 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN 'S' THEN 2 WHEN 'P' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ASC
i.end_time DESC p.approved_at DESC
